title: Data Analyst
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Data Analyst to support data management operations for our Data Cloud project. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in financial industry data management, with expertise in data reconciliation, quality checks, and data analysis. This role requires someone who can handle multiple tasks, maintain accuracy, and provide excellent support to stakeholders.

Key Responsibilities

  • Perform data reconciliation, monitoring, and quality checks, ensuring accuracy and compliance.
  • Conduct hands-on data analysis to support operational and project needs.
  • Manage SLA and end-user queries, ensuring timely resolution.
  • Provide documentation support, including technical and functional specifications.
  • Collaborate with stakeholders and project teams to troubleshoot and resolve data issues.
  • Manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment with attention to detail.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
  • 3–7 years of experience in Data Management, preferably in the financial industry.
  • Strong SQL and Python skills.
  • Hands-on experience in data reconciliation, quality checks, and troubleshooting.
  • Experience in managing SLA and responding to end-user queries.
  • Strong problem-solving, communication, and documentation skills.
  • Detail-oriented with a focus on data quality and accuracy.
  • Ability to handle multiple tasks and priorities effectively.

EA Number: 11C4879

postedCompany.description:
Headquartered in Singapore, we are one of Asia Pacific’s leading organizations, providing technology consulting, software development and outsourcing services, with operations in 5 countries across the region and with development centres in Singapore, Malaysia and India.

Apar Technologies is a part of the Apar Group, a billion dollar industrial conglomerate and managed by Basil Partners, a successful technology venture fund.

Apar combines a passion for client satisfaction, deep industry and technology expertise and a global workforce working in an honest and ethical work environment to deliver value.

Our four growth platforms—Technology consulting, Business intelligence, Collaboration and Cloud and big data—are the innovation engines through which we build world-class skills and capabilities and create, acquire and manage key assets central to the development of world class services and solutions for our clients.

Apar aims to be the preferred business partner of global companies, helping them create best – in- class technology and business solutions.
postedCompany.name: APAR TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD.
